intro: Kozhikode (Calicut) is one of Kerala's most historic cities, with a booming IT sector along Mavoor Road and the Cyberpark corridor. ShiftIndia's 230+ verified vendors cover all localities from old Calicut beach-side to new tech hub areas.
whyUs: Kerala's monsoons are intense, and Kozhikode's coastal location amplifies this. Our vendors use heavy-duty weatherproof packing as standard during June-September.
